title: Dearness Allowance: What are the types of DA? How often are they revised? We answer the top FAQs
summary: Dearness Allowance is of two types, one which is revised quarterly based on CPI, and the other revised semi-annually. Both these aim to mitigate inflation effects for households of central government employees.

title: Looking for safe returns? These 5 government-backed schemes offer over 7.5% interest
summary: Several government-backed savings schemes in India offer annual interest rates of 7.5% and higher. These options cater to various groups and provide tax benefits, attracting conservative investors.

title: Loan waiver offer? RBI says it could be a scam; 5 ways borrowers can protect themselves
summary: RBI warns borrowers about rising fake loan waiver scams nationwide, urging verification with banks, avoiding upfront fees, and relying on official sources to prevent financial losses and credit damage.

title: 8th central pay commission: Memorandum submission date extended to 31 May — Six months on here are the top updates

title: A digital living will: What it means for your family's financial decision
summary: Maharashtra’s digital living will framework may seem like a small administrative step. But for families that use it, it does something estate planning often cannot

title: ₹9000 monthly SIP can help you retire at 45 with ₹2 lakh monthly pension
summary: A 25-year-old investor can accumulate ₹3,64,92,972 in the next 20 years through a disciplined monthly SIP of ₹9,000, potentially providing a monthly pension of ₹2 lakh post-retirement at 45 through a SWP for the next 40 years

title: Rupee falls to 95.16 vs dollar; Steve Hanke warns of further slide—5 ways it hits your personal finance
summary: Rupee falls to ₹95.16/USD, highlighting currency weakness, as Steve Hanke warns of a continued slide without inflows, which could impact inflation, travel costs, EMIs, investments and savings across the country.&nbsp;

title: 100% FDI in Insurance: What rule says? What will be its impact?
summary: The Finance Ministry has approved 100% foreign direct investment in the insurance sector under the automatic route, with a 20% cap for LIC. This reform aims to enhance technology and product design, addressing India's insurance penetration gap and improving affordability and distribution.

title: The great fuel hedge: can EVs become a solution to India's ICE volatility
summary: With crude over $110, a weak rupee, E20 mandates and BS6 diesel costs rising, electric vehicles are emerging not just as green alternatives but as India’s fiscal hedge.&nbsp;

title: Senior citizen FD rates May 2026: PSU banks offer safe returns up to 7.10% for income and capital protection
summary: Senior citizen FD rates in May 2026 across prominent PSU banks show stable returns up to 7.10%, offering safe income, inflation protection and predictable investment options in a volatile economy.

title: Capital deployment in India's realty surges 88% to record USD 30.7 billion: CBRE Report
summary: Former HDFC Chairman Deepak Parekh released a CBRE South Asia report at the CII BFSI Summit 2026, which highlighted a surge in capital deployment in India's real estate sector, with equity inflows touching a record USD 30.7 billion between 2024 and the first quarter of 2026.

title: India's new 10-year bond likely to be issued at above 7% coupon: analysts
summary: India's ​new 10-year bond will likely ​be issued at a coupon above 7% ​for the first time in two years, as the risk of higher inflation and global market pressures drive funding costs up, analysts said.

title: Sebi mulls allowing OBPPs to offer products regulated by IFSCA, tax-saving bonds
summary: Markets regulator Sebi on Tuesday proposed allowing Online Bond Platform Providers (OBPPs) to offer products or services regulated by International Financial Services Centres Authority (IFSCA) and certain tax-saving bonds under the Income Tax Act.

title: Voltamp Transformers Q4 Results: Shares crash 20% after weak March quarter numbers. Check details
summary: Voltamp Transformers shares plunged after weak Q4 FY26 results, with profit halving and margins sharply declining due to one-time provisions, rising input costs, and currency impact. Revenue remained flat, though annual performance showed growth and order backlog stayed strong.

title: Marico Q4 Results: Profit rises 14% to Rs 391 crore; co declares Rs 4 dividend
summary: Marico reported strong March quarter results with 22% revenue growth and 14% profit rise, driven by robust India volumes and international momentum. Margins contracted due to high input costs. Board announced Rs 4 dividend, while full-year growth hit multi-year highs.

title: Rupee hits record low at 95.28 vs USD as economic worries mount on renewed US-Iran tensions
summary: The rupee reached a historic low against the dollar on Tuesday. This decline is linked to renewed tensions in the Middle East and escalating oil prices. The Reserve Bank of India is exploring measures to strengthen the rupee. Other Asian currencies also faced pressure. India's stock market and bond

title: Biocon shares rise 1% after billionaire Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw names niece as successor
summary: Biocon's chairperson, Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw, has named her niece, Claire Mazumdar, as her successor, sparking a more than 1% jump in the company's shares. Shaw, who founded Biocon over 40 years ago, expressed confidence in Claire's ability to lead the company's future growth, driven by advanced biotec

title: Retail investors, HNIs shifting from holding direct stocks to mutual funds. Here’s why
summary: Individual investors in India are increasingly shifting from direct stock holdings to mutual funds, with direct ownership hitting a five-year low and MF holdings reaching record highs. Strong SIP inflows and declining FII participation are driving domestic institutions to become key market stabilise

title: Value 360 Communications IPO subscribed 44% on Day 1; Rs 41.69 crore issue closes on May 6
summary: Value 360 Communications Limited launched its Rs. 41.69 crore public issue on May 4, 2026, with subscription closing on May 06, 2026. By the end of Day 1, the IPO was subscribed 0.46 times across all investor categories. The integrated communications firm's shares will be listed on NSE Emerge.

title: Commodity Radar: Zinc shines as a lucrative bet on strong fundamentals, but technicals suggest consolidation. What should traders do?
summary: Zinc futures rose on MCX, driven by tightening global supply, Chinese smelter maintenance, falling inventories, and currency support. Despite strong fundamentals, technical indicators suggest consolidation, with analysts maintaining a buy-on-dips strategy above key support levels and upside targets
